description: In ESA SNAP Desktop, you need to mask out the exterior of a wildlife reserve and export the result for a legacy software system. Using the Landsat multi-spectral image at '/home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif' and the reserve boundary shapefile at '/home/ga/snap_data/reserve_boundary.shp', apply the vector as a spatial mask so that all pixels outside the reserve boundary are set to NoData or 0. Export the masked product in ENVI format to the '/home/ga/snap_exports/' directory.
